content.text:
# Customer Support Playbook
## Ticketing, SLAs & Escalation Procedures

**Document Owner:** Head of Customer Success  
**Last Updated:** March 2026  
**Version:** 1.0  

---

## Support Philosophy

> *"Every support interaction is an opportunity to turn a customer into an advocate."*

We optimize for:
1. **Speed** - First response within SLAs, resolution as fast as quality allows
2. **Quality** - Right answer the first time, not the fastest answer
3. **Empathy** - Meet customers where they are, acknowledge impact
4. **Learning** - Every ticket teaches us something about our product

---

## Support Channels

| Channel | Target Response | Hours | Escalation Path |
|---------|-----------------|-------|-----------------|
| In-App Chat | <2 min | 24/7 (bot), 6am-6pm PT (human) | Auto-escalate to human if bot fails |
| Email | <4 hours | 24/7 (queued), 6am-6pm PT (human) | Auto-triage by category |
| Phone | <30 min | 9am-5pm PT (Enterprise only) | Direct to assigned CSM |
| Slack Connect | <15 min | 9am-6pm PT (Enterprise contracts) | Escalates to on-call engineer |
| Community Forum | <24 hours | Best effort | Community + moderator |

---

## Ticket Classification System

### Severity Levels

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  P0 - CRITICAL    P1 - HIGH      P2 - MEDIUM    P3 - LOW      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ    в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ      в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ    в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Site down        Major feature  Minor bug       Question     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Data loss        degraded       How-to          Feedback     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Security         Payment issue  Feature req     General      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  breach                                                       в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Classification Criteria

#### P0 - Critical (Red)
**Definition:** Complete service outage, data integrity issue, security incident

**Examples:**
- Production environment inaccessible
- Data corruption or unauthorized access
- Complete payment processing failure
- Regulatory compliance breach

**Response Requirements:**
- Immediate acknowledgment (<5 min)
- Incident commander assigned
- Executive notification within 15 min
- War room convened if needed
- Status page updated within 30 min

#### P1 - High (Orange)
**Definition:** Major feature impaired, significant business impact

**Examples:**
- Core functionality degraded/buggy
- Integration failure with major platform
- Payment retry failures
- Performance degradation >50%

**Response Requirements:**
- Acknowledgment within 30 min
- Workaround identified within 2 hours
- Permanent fix within 24 hours
- Proactive customer communication

#### P2 - Medium (Yellow)
**Definition:** Non-critical issue affecting usability

**Examples:**
- Minor UI/UX bugs
- Single feature not working as expected
- Documentation inaccuracies
- Performance degradation <50%

**Response Requirements:**
- Acknowledgment within 4 hours
- Resolution within 3 business days
- Clear timeline communicated

#### P3 - Low (Blue)
**Definition:** Questions, requests, general feedback

**Examples:**
- How-to questions
- Feature requests
- Billing inquiries
- General feedback

**Response Requirements:**
- Acknowledgment within 24 hours
- Resolution within 5 business days
- Routed to appropriate team

---

## SLA Matrix

### Response Times (First Contact)

| Severity | Self-Serve | Team Plan | Business | Enterprise |
|----------|------------|-----------|----------|------------|
| P0 | N/A | 15 min | 10 min | 5 min |
| P1 | N/A | 2 hours | 1 hour | 30 min |
| P2 | 24 hours | 8 hours | 4 hours | 2 hours |
| P3 | 48 hours | 24 hours | 24 hours | 8 hours |

### Resolution Times (Time to Close)

| Severity | Target | Stretch Goal |
|----------|--------|--------------|
| P0 | 4 hours | 2 hours |
| P1 | 24 hours | 12 hours |
| P2 | 72 hours | 48 hours |
| P3 | 7 days | 3 days |

### Availability by Tier

| Tier | Support Hours | Channels |
|------|---------------|----------|
| Self-Serve | Email only, 48h response | Documentation, Community |
| Team ($49/user/mo) | Business hours PT | Email, Chat |
| Business ($99/user/mo) | Extended hours PT | Email, Chat, Priority Queue |
| Enterprise (Custom) | 24/7 + weekend coverage | All channels, Slack Connect, Dedicated CSM |

---

## Ticket Routing Logic

### Automatic Triage

```
New Ticket Created
       в”Ӯ
       в–ј
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    Yes    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Contains     в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ Auto-Tag    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ "urgent/     в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ P0/P1       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  down/       в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ Page On-Callв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  broken"?    в”Ӯ           в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
       в”Ӯ No
       в–ј
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    Yes    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Enterprise   в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ Route to    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Customer?    в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ Assigned    в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ           в”Ӯ CSM         в”Ӯ
       в”Ӯ No                в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
       в–ј
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    Yes    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Contains     в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ Route to    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ keywords fromв”Ӯ           в”Ӯ Billing     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ billing KB?  в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ Team        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ           в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
       в”Ӯ No
       в–ј
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    Yes    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Contains     в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ Route to    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ technical    в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ Technical   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ error/       в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ Support     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ integration? в”Ӯ           в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
       в”Ӯ No
       в–ј
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ General Queueв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ (Round-robin)в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Team Assignments

| Queue | Owner | Specialization |
|-------|-------|----------------|
| Technical Support | support-team@ | API, integrations, bugs |
| Billing | billing@ | Invoices, payment, upgrades |
| Success Managers | csms@ | Account health, renewals |
| Sales | sales@ | Upsells, expansions |
| Product Feedback | product@ | Feature requests, roadmap |

---

## Escalation Procedures

### Escalation Triggers

Auto-escalate when:
- [ ] P0/P1 ticket unacknowledged after 15 min
- [ ] Ticket re-opened 3+ times
- [ ] Customer requests escalation
- [ ] Sentiment analysis detects frustration
- [ ] Enterprise customer mentions churn

### Escalation Ladder

```
Level 1: Support Agent
  в””в”Җ First line support, handles P2/P3
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј (P0/P1 or complex issue)
Level 2: Senior Support Engineer
  в””в”Җ Technical depth, P1 resolution
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј (Engineering required)
Level 3: On-Call Engineer
  в””в”Җ Bug fixes, production issues
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј (Executive attention needed)
Level 4: Customer Success Manager
  в””в”Җ Relationship management, escalations
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј (Business-threatening)
Level 5: VP CS / COO
  в””в”Җ Executive decision authority
```

### Escalation Communication Templates

**L2 вҶ’ L3 Escalation (Engineering)**
```
Subject: [ESCALATION] {Ticket #} - {Brief Description}

Severity: {P0/P1}
Customer: {Account Name} ({Tier})
Impact: {Number of users/dollars at risk}

Issue Summary:
{2-3 sentence description}

Steps Taken:
- {What the agent tried}
- {What they learned}

Customer Sentiment: {Frustrated/Concerned/Neutral}
Next Response Due: {Time}

Please ACK within 15 minutes.
```

**L4 вҶ’ L5 Escalation (Executive)**
```
Subject: [EXEC ESCALATION] {Account} - {Issue}

Customer: {Name, ARR, Health Score}
Issue: {Business impact}
Duration: {How long ongoing}
Churn Risk: {High/Medium/Low with reasoning}

Recommended Action:
{Proposed resolution, compensation, etc.}

CC: {CSM}, {Account Manager}
```

---

## Support Tools Stack

| Function | Tool | Purpose |
|

arguments.content:
# Customer Success Playbook
## Onboarding, Health Scoring & Expansion Guide

**Document Owner:** VP of Customer Success  
**Last Updated:** March 2026  
**Version:** 1.0  

---

## Table of Contents
1. [Customer Journey Map](#1-customer-journey-map)
2. [Onboarding Framework](#2-onboarding-framework)
3. [Health Scoring System](#3-health-scoring-system)
4. [Expansion Playbook](#4-expansion-playbook)
5. [Success Milestones](#5-success-milestones)
6. [Quarterly Business Reviews](#6-quarterly-business-reviews)

---

## 1. Customer Journey Map

### Journey Stages

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  AWARE   в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ CONSIDER в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ  ADOPT   в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ EXPAND   в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ ADVOCATE в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ - Trial  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - Demo   в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - Onboardв”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - Upsell в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - Refer  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ - Contentв”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - Pilot  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - First  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - Cross- в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - Case   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ - SEO    в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - POC    в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   Value  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   sell   в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   Study  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ - Events в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - Compareв”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - Launch в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - New Useв”Ӯ    в”Ӯ - Review в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
     в”Ӯ                в”Ӯ                в”Ӯ                в”Ӯ                в”Ӯ
   Sales          Sales            CS Team          CSM/AE           Everyone
  Marketing       Solutions                         AM              CSM PM
```

### Success Milestones by Stage

| Stage | Entry Criteria | Success Definition | Exit Criteria | Timeframe |
|-------|---------------|-------------------|---------------|-----------|
| **Onboard** | Contract signed | Account configured, users trained | First value realized | 0-30 days |
| **Adopt** | First value delivered | Regular usage patterns | Core features adopted | 30-90 days |
| **Expand** | Strong usage metrics | Additional seats/features purchased | Revenue grown >20% | 90-180 days |
| **Advocate** | High NPS, references | Referrals, case studies, speaking | - | Ongoing |

---

## 2. Onboarding Framework

### 2.1 Onboarding Philosophy

> *"Speed to first value is the #1 predictor of long-term retention."*

**Core Principles:**
1. **Outcome-oriented** вҖ” Not feature training, but business outcome achievement
2. **High-touch to low-touch** вҖ” Start concierge, move to self-serve as customer succeeds
3. **Milestone-driven** вҖ” Clear success gates, not arbitrary timeboxes
4. **Proactive communication** вҖ” Reach out before they have to ask

### 2.2 Onboarding by Segment

#### Tier 1: Self-Serve (Team plans, <$1K ARR)

| Week | Focus | Deliverables | Touchpoint |
|------|-------|--------------|------------|
| 0 | Setup | Welcome email, quick-start video, setup wizard | Automated |
| 1 | Activation | In-app guidance to first value | In-app tooltip series |
| 2 | Integration | Help center articles, community support | Email check-in |
| 4 | Review | Usage analytics review | Automated email |
| 8 | Expansion | Upgrade paths highlighted | In-app notification |

**Resources:**
- Self-serve onboarding wizard
- Video library (10 x 2-min videos)
- In-app contextual help
- Community forum
- Office hours (weekly)

#### Tier 2: High-Touch (Business plans, $1K-$10K ARR)

| Phase | Timeline | Activities | Deliverables | Owner |
|-------|----------|------------|--------------|-------|
| **Kickoff** | Week 0 | Welcome call, stakeholder map, success plan | Agenda, Attendee list, Success plan | CSM |
| **Setup** | Week 0-1 | Configuration, SSO, integrations | Configured instance, Test accounts | Solutions |
| **Training** | Week 1-2 | Admin training, user training (live + recorded) | Recording, Q&A doc, User guides | CSM |
| **Launch** | Week 2-3 | Pilot group launch, feedback collection | Launch announcement, Feedback report | CSM + PM |
| **Scale** | Week 3-4 | Full rollout, adoption monitoring | Usage dashboard, Success metrics | CSM |
| **Value** | Week 4-6 | ROI documentation, early wins | Case study draft, ROI presentation | CSM |
| **QBR** | Month 3 | First quarterly review | QBR deck, Success metrics | CSM |

**Resources:**
- Dedicated CSM
- Technical Solutions Engineer
- Onboarding project tracker
- Weekly status calls
- Slack channel for Q&A

#### Tier 3: White Glove (Enterprise, >$10K ARR)

| Phase | Timeline | Activities | Deliverables |
|-------|----------|------------|--------------|
| **Executive Alignment** | Day 0-3 | Executive sponsor call, strategic objectives | Alignment memo, RACI |
| **Implementation** | Week 0-4 | Custom config, integrations, data migration | Technical design, Migration plan |
| **Change Management** | Week 2-6 | Stakeholder comms, training schedule | Comms plan, Training calendar |
| **Pilot** | Week 4-8 | Controlled rollout to power users | Pilot feedback, Success criteria |
| **Full Deployment** | Week 8-12 | Organization-wide rollout | Launch plan, User adoption |
| **Optimization** | Month 3-6 | Workflow optimization, advanced features | Best practices guide |
| **Expansion Planning** | Month 6+ | Multi-year roadmap, use case expansion | Expansion proposal |

**Resources:**
- Executive sponsor + CSM
- Solutions Architect
- Professional Services (optional)
- Weekly steering committee
- 24/7 Slack Connect
- On-site sessions (as needed)

### 2.3 The First 30 Days

```
Day 0 в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶ Day 30
в”Ӯ                                                                           в”Ӯ

```

#### Day 0: Welcome & Kickoff
- [ ] Welcome package sent (physical for Enterprise)
- [ ] Introductory call within 24 hours of signup
- [ ] Stakeholder map created (champion, decision maker, users, blockers)
- [ ] Success plan template customized and shared
- [ ] Slack/Teams channel created and populated

#### Week 1: Foundation
- [ ] Technical setup complete (SSO, integrations, data import)
- [ ] Super admin training completed
- [ ] First workflow configured
- [ ] Champion identified and empowered
- [ ] Office hours attended

#### Week 2: First Value
- [ ] First team invited and onboarded
- [ ] First meaningful output generated
- [ ] Success criteria validated with customer
- [ ] Blockers addressed
- [ ] Usage patterns monitored

#### Week 3-4: Adoption
- [ ] Secondary use cases identified
- [ ] Additional users trained
- [ ] Early wins documented
- [ ] Feedback collected and acted upon
- [ ] Expansion opportunities identified

#### Day 30: Value Realization
- [ ] Usage dashboard review
- [ ] Success metrics baseline established
- [ ] ROI preliminary calculation
- [ ] QBR scheduled
- [ ] Expansion opportunity sized

### 2.4 Onboarding Success Metrics

| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| **Time to First Value** | <5 days | Days from signup to first meaningful action |
| **Onboarding Completion** | >90% | % completing all onboarding steps |
| **30-Day Activation** | >80% | % with weekly active usage at Day 30 |
| **90-Day Retention** | >85% | % still active at Day 90 |
| **CSAT (Onboarding)** | >4.5/5 | Post-onboarding survey score |
| **Support Tickets** | <2 | Avg tickets during first 30 days |

---
